response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-leading C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of cloud platform leadership or distributed systems ownership as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in software practices
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure automation experience
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering roles
